title: ReplicationReplicateForceDeleteRequest
description: Specifies the parameters available when force deleting replication operations.

id.description: The unique identifier (ID) of the replication operation to be forcefully deleted.

collection.description: The name of the collection to which the shard being replicated belongs.

shard.description: The identifier of the shard involved in the replication operations.

node.description: The name of the target node where the replication operations are registered.

dryRun.description: If true, the operation will not actually delete anything but will return the expected outcome of the deletion.
